import{MessageEvent}from'@nitrots/nitro-renderer';import{TokenPurchaseOkParser}from'@nitrots/nitro-renderer/src/nitro/communication/messages/parser/TokenPurchaseOkParser';export class TokenPurchaseOkEvent extends MessageEvent{constructor(callBack){super(callBack,TokenPurchaseOkParser);}getParser(){return this.parser;}}// Bridge to your React view (DiamondsStoreView listens to "store_tokens_purchase_ok_raw")
export const tokenPurchaseOkEventCallback=event=>{const p=event.getParser();window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('store_tokens_purchase_ok_raw',{detail:{tokenId:p.tokenId,diamonds:p.diamonds,activeUntilTs:p.activeUntilTs}}));};
